title: Preparing for the Final Trimester
subtitle: Growth and maturity continue
description: By week 26, your baby continues to grow and gain weight. The lungs are developing further, and movements are strong and consistent. You are also approaching the final trimester of pregnancy.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements are strong and regular
Lung development continues, preparing for breathing after birth
You may notice more defined patterns of activity and rest
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Engage in light exercise and maintain proper posture

medical_checkups.note: Monitoring continues as you approach the third trimester.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may review glucose test results and adjust care plans if needed.

important_note: Approaching the third trimester marks an important transition in your pregnancy journey.
reassurance: Your baby is growing stronger each day as you move closer to the final stage.
medical_disclaimer: Always follow your healthcare provider’s advice for ongoing care and monitoring.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels remains essential as growth and weight gain increase.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be reviewed regularly during prenatal visits.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management supports a healthy progression.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports increased blood volume and oxygen supply.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation as you approach the final trimester.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued growth and metabolic function.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As you approach the third trimester, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support a healthy journey forward.
